confirmed.title: Marketplace Checkout document title hardcoded English 'Checkout' while page + sibling pages are pt-BR
confirmed.suggested_key: literal swap: `Finalizar compra — ${plugin.name}` (marketplace app has no t() runtime; match CheckoutSuccess/CheckoutCancelled Head title pattern)
confirmed.detail:
ships the literal English word 'Checkout' as the browser tab / document title. This is user-facing chrome (window title, bookmarks, history). It is inconsistent with (a) the page's own visible

Finalizar compra

on line 31, and (b) the sibling checkout pages CheckoutSuccess.tsx:23 (`Compra confirmada — ...`) and CheckoutCancelled.tsx:11 (`Compra cancelada — ...`), both of which use pt-BR title prefixes. Should read e.g. `Finalizar compra — ${plugin.name}`. Not in the ledger: the only prior Checkout.tsx entry (round 11) covered the money formatter at line 16, not this Head title. Note: the marketplace app uses static pt-BR copy (no t() runtime), so the fix is a literal swap to pt-BR, matching the sibling pattern.
confirmed.why_real: Confirmed at apps/marketplace/resources/js/Pages/Marketplace/Checkout.tsx:24: <Head title={`Checkout — ${plugin.name}`} /> ships the English word 'Checkout' as the document title (browser tab/bookmarks/history) — user-facing chrome. The marketplace app uses static pt-BR copy throughout, and the inconsistency is verifiable: the same page's visible h1 is 'Finalizar compra' (line 26), and sibling pages use pt-BR title prefixes — CheckoutSuccess.tsx:23 ('Compra confirmada — ...') and CheckoutCancelled.tsx:11 ('Compra cancelada — ...'). Ledger check: the only prior Checkout.tsx entry is round 11 line 16, covering the money formatter, NOT the Head title at line 24 — so this is novel and not a duplicate. Not a vendored shadcn primitive (it's an app page, not packages-js/ui/src/shadcn/*). Not deliberately out of scope. Fix is a literal pt-BR swap (e.g. 'Finalizar compra — ${plugin.name}') matching the sibling pattern.
